creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Rodrigo Osorio from comment #9)
For reasons unknown, I never received alerts to your previous
messages/comments regarding this port, Rodrigo.
In any event, I was unable to work with the shar(1) file you
created. It appeared to actually be several individual shar
files cat(1)'d together. In any event, I created a new shar
attachment. It is complete, and you should find it meets all
the necessary standards required to revive the port; net/balance.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration, Rodrigo.

--Chris
